text:
🔭 Agentic AI frameworks landscape (2026)

Modern agentic frameworks converge on a 6-layer stack (tool-use, orchestration, state/memory, evaluation, observability, deployment) rather than staying thin LLM+tool wrappers (practitioner consensus).
- LangGraph: graph-based orchestration, most control, steepest curve, most production-mature (tier 2)
- CrewAI: role-based crews, fastest prototyping, least control, ~18% more token overhead than LangGraph (tier 2)
- AutoGen/AG2: conversational GroupChat orchestration (tier 2)
- Google ADK / Mastra: full agent+memory+eval+deploy stacks (code-first vs. TS-first) (tier 2)
- Gap: KDnuggets source article blocked (403) — only 5 of its 10 named frameworks confirmed via search cache; full list unverified.
